song.title: All the Way My Savior Leads Me
song.lyrics:
[V1] 1) All the way my Savior leads me; What have I to ask beside? Can I doubt His tender mercy, Who through life has been my Guide?|| Heav’nly peace, divinest comfort, Here by faith in Him to dwell! For I know, whate’er befall me, Jesus doeth all things well. For I know whate’er befall me, Jesus doeth all things well.
[V2] 2) All the way my Savior leads me, Cheers each winding path I tread, Gives me grace for every trial, Feeds me with the living bread.|| Though my weary steps may falter, And my soul athirst may be, Gushing from the Rock before me, Lo! a spring of joy I see Gushing from the rock before me, Lo! a spring of joy I see.
[V3] 3) All the way my Savior leads me; Oh, the fullness of His love! Perfect rest to me is promised In my Father’s house above.|| When my spirit, clothed immortal, Wings its flight to realms of day, This my song through endless ages: Jesus led me all the way. This my song through endless ages: Jesus led me all the way.
song.author: Fanny J. Crosby
